description: Single-module AGP app; qodana.yaml bootstrap installs platforms;android-34 + build-tools;34.0.0. Asserts AndroidLint category survives (>=1 result) and HardcodedText is reported (QD-11439). Network on (android's accepted cost).

expectations.reason: AndroidLint category must not vanish: at least one AndroidLint-family result (rule ids are AndroidLint:<Issue>) must be reported. Guards QD-11439 (whole category disappeared).

Hardcoded android:text literal in activity_main.xml must trip AndroidLint HardcodedText. GUESSED rule id 'AndroidLint:HardcodedText' (pin:needs-pinning) — the harness resolves the exact id from the CI control run; replace with the run's actual ruleId before marking confirmed.

ImageView with no android:contentDescription is the second planted AndroidLint smell. GUESSED rule id 'AndroidLint:ContentDescription' (pin:needs-pinning) — resolve from the CI control run and confirm.

mustNotContain.text: Read access is allowed from inside read-action only
